response.step_by_step_log: Identified song title "Like! Like! Like!" and artists ゆうゆ (Yuuyu) and TOYA from on-screen text at 03:10. Performed targeted web searches using "Like! Like! Like!" "ゆうゆ" "TOYA" lyrics. As no official lyrics pages were returned, lyrics set to null.
response.global_summary: The video shows a 2026 birthday festival event for Hololive VTubers Fuwawa and Mococo. The majority of the video consists of banter and introductions. At 03:10, a performance of the song "Like! Like! Like!" begins, featuring Fuwawa Abyssgard, Mococo Abyssgard, and special guest Mori Calliope. The performance continues until the end of the video.

scenes.description: Fuwawa Abyssgard, Mococo Abyssgard, and Mori Calliope perform the song "Like! Like! Like!" on a brightly decorated stage. On-screen text indicates lyrics by ゆうゆ (Yuuyu) and music by TOYA.
scenes.performer_in_video: Fuwawa Abyssgard, Mococo Abyssgard, Mori Calliope

scenes.description: Banter and introduction segment for the Fuwawa & Mococo Birthday Festival.
